title: NutriChef Non-Stick Pizza Tray - with Silicone Handle, Round Steel Non-Stick Pan with Perforated Holes, Premium Bakeware, Pizza Tray with Silicone and Oversized Handle, Dishwasher Safe
features: PREMIUM QUALITY STEEL PIZZA PAN – Made from high-grade round steel with perforated holes for easy food release. BPA-free materials ensure safety and durability for everyday baking.
NATURALLY NON-STICK SURFACE – Requires less oil or butter, making cleanup quick and easy. Achieve perfectly cooked pizzas with minimal effort and no scrubbing needed.
PERFECT SIZE & DESIGN – Measures 37.5 x 33 x 2.5 cm. Perforated base promotes maximum air circulation for a crispy, evenly baked crust every time.
GRIP SILICONE HANDLES – Silicone-covered handles provide a secure, comfortable grip. Rolled edges protect your hands from heat, even when the pan is very hot.
EASY TO CLEAN & CONVENIENT – Durable non-stick coating allows effortless food release and quick cleaning. Dishwasher safe, with hand wash option for longer life. Stylish and practical gift idea.
description: Product Description NON-STICK PAN Naturally slick pans require less oil or butter for baking and less scrubbing for a spotless look and easy cleaning. Clean with no hassle and eat your pizza perfectly GREAT ELEGANT DESIGN The diameter of the pizza pan is 14.8'' x 13'' x 1'' -inches. Designed to heat quickly and evenly. It is perforated to allow for maximum air circulation, resulting in a crispy crust GRIP SILICONE HANDLES The silicone handle covers make it easy to grip, and the edges are nicely rolled for extra protection and is sure to not burn our hands even when the pan is very very hot
